character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator, captured, interacts with Silver, feels uneasy about the treasure hunt.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of pirates, strategizes, has weapons, interacts with Jim.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Warned Jim to run, Silver mentions him.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the opposing side, Silver mentions him as someone to deal with.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in Silver's plan to be dealt with.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Perched on Silver's shoulder, part of the pirate crew.
